view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting in the context of a DDoS attack simulation. However, there is no direct evidence provided that demonstrates the outcome of this simulation or how the system responds to such an attack. The expected result requires confirmation of scenario behavior or a failure report, but without traces or snapshots from the simulation, the evidence remains inconclusive.
